title: 50 miler approved
review_text: Used this for a 50-mile ultra. Zero bounce with the sternum straps tightened. Soft flasks are easy to drink from at pace. Tons of pocket space for gels.

title: Clean the flasks
review_text: Great vest but the soft flasks develop a plastic taste if you don't clean them after every use. Baking soda soak fixes it. Vest itself is the best I've tried.
